verses.text: "MISAORA an' i Jehovah fa tsara Izy; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
Misaora ny Andriamanitry ny andriamanitra, fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
Misaora ny Tompon' ny tompo, fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony.
"Izy irery no manao fahagagana lehibe; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay nanao ny lanitra tamin' ny fahendrena; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay namelatra ny tany ho ambonin' ny rano; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay nanao ny fanazavana lehibe; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ny masoandro hanapaka ny andro; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ny volana sy ny kintana hanapaka ny alina; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay namely an' i Egypta tamin' ny voalohan-terany; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ka nitondra ny Isiraely nivoaka avy tao aminy; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Tamin' ny tanana mahery sy ny sandry nahinjitra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay nampisaraka ny Ranomasina Mena; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ka nampandeha ny Isiraely namaky teo afovoany; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Fa nanary an' i Farao sy ny miaramilany tao anatin' ny Ranomasina Mena; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay nitarika ny olony nitety ny efitra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay namely mpanjaka lehibe; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ary nahafaty mpanjaka malaza; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony:"
"Sihona, mpanjakan' ny Amorita; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Sy Oga, mpanjakan' i Basana; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ary ny tanin' ireo nomeny ho lova; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Dia ho lovan' ny Isiraely mpanompony; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay nahatsiaro antsika tamin' ny fahambaniantsika; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Ka nanavotra antsika ho afaka amin' ny fahavalontsika; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Izay manome hanina ny nofo rehetra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
"Misaora an' Andriamanitry ny lanitra; fa maharitra mandrakizay ny famindrampony."
